title: API provider activation for L1 generation

advantages: default API provider class supported by the architecture decision
risks: model and response shape drift must be detected
provider_option_analysis.activation_requirement: human selects credential source and model policy before any paid call

advantages: default API provider class supported by the architecture decision
can be compared against fixture output through the same evidence contract
risks: response shape drift must be detected
provider_option_analysis.activation_requirement: human selects credential source and model policy before any paid call

risks: must not duplicate auto_router routing control plane inside dev_master
provider_option_analysis.activation_requirement: human confirms auto_router service availability and approved contract before use

rules: raw output must be stored before parsing when feasible
parsed output must reference parser schema version
unknown provider version, missing fields, provider warnings, or parse errors set drift_detected=true
drifted output cannot authorize dispatch, approval, ratchet widening, deploy, release, or Gate pass
evidence must be replayable from raw output plus parser version

fixture_to_real_provider_comparison_plan.phase_10_first_slice: contract-only provider preflight with no paid call
later_paid_smoke_allowed_only_after: human approves one paid smoke call under single_paid_smoke_max_usd

scope_in: Gate O and Phase 10 contract-only path

proposed_sequence.purpose: Review this proposal before any provider contract or paid-call work begins.
Implement provider contract preflight artifacts without making paid provider calls.
Review contract-only provider preflight evidence before asking for human approval of a single paid smoke call.

task_proposal.goal: Prepare API-backed provider generation for the L1 prototype pipeline without making any real provider call in this slice.

expected_artifacts: credential preflight report without secret values

task_proposal.rationale: The local L1 prototype pipeline is proven. The next step should prepare API provider contracts, credentials, cost ceilings, raw evidence, and drift controls before any paid model call is allowed.

acceptance_checks: No real provider call is authorized by this proposal.
Credential source is selected by a human before any paid call.
Cost ceilings are enforced as hard blocks.
Provider output evidence preserves raw and parsed outputs with drift status.
Subscription CLI daemonization, deploy, PR creation, external repo mutation, Web Console, IDE extension, and production side effects remain out of scope.
recommendation: Proceed to Gate O review. After Gate O, implement only contract preflight artifacts; do not make any paid provider call until a later human-approved gate.
